titleStmt.title: SII 22.127: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 127. (A.R. No. 127 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON A STONE SET UP AT THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE (MAIN) ENTRANCE. ACHYUTADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA—ŚAKA 1452 (wrong for 1454).

summary.p: The details of date are given as Nandana, Mithuna, śu. 10, Svāti, Wednesday which correspond to A.D. 1532, June 12.

This records the remission of the taxes jōḍi and śūlavari on all the dēvadāna lands on the banks of the Peṇṇai belonging to the temple of Tāntōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyanāyiṉār at Śambai alias Vīrarājēndraśōḻapuram in Vāṇagōppāḍi-nāḍu for meeting the expenses of worship and repairs in the temple, on the representation made to the king by Vaiyappa-Nāyakkar, during the administration of the region by Bommu-Nāyakar of Vēlūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīmat
makāmaṇṭalecuraṉ
metinimicurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri
cāḷuva naraciṅkateva kumā
ra Accutateva makārāyar pi
ṟutuvirācciyam paṇṇi A
ruḷāniṉṟa cakābdam 10 4
5 10 2 Itiṉmel cel
lāniṉṟa nantaṉasaṅ
vaṟcarattu mituṉanāyaṟ
ṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu daśamiyu
m svāti nakṣattiṟattu puta
vārattunāḷ peṇṇai
vaṭakarai vāṇako (mā)
ppāṭināṭṭu virarācen
tiracoḻapuramāṉa campai
uṭaiyār tiruttānto
ṉṟi Āḷuṭaiyanayiṉār
(r) tevastānattil co
ṭi cūlavari peṇṇai
kkarai Iru(p)pattunaālu
tevattaāmum caṉava
māṉiyamāka naṭakkutu Eṉṟu
vaiyyappa nāyakkar Ayyaṉ
cukāmi pātattile viṇṇa
ppam ceytu camukattil Appa(ka)
ṇaippaṭikku yiṉnayiṉāṟku
tiruppaṇi makaā pūcaikkum can
tirātittavaraiyum coṭi cūlavari
kaḻittu caṟuvamāṉiyamāka
naṭattumpaṭikku
velūr po
mmu nāyak
kar Atikārat
til caṟuvamā
niyam paṇ
ṇi kalve
ṭṭinapaṭikku I
tukku yāto
ruvaṉ Akitam
paṇṇinava
n keṅkaika
raiyil kārām
pacuvai ko
ṉṟa toṣa
ttile po
vān Eḻānara
kattil kiḻā
narakam puku
vān Itu pa
ṉmāye
curarakṣai
śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 22.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
